overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player exploring a wilderness area at dawn. The player walks through rocky grasslands and pine forests, encounters a horse rider, approaches a river, and crosses a wooden bridge in a mountainous landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky grassland with large boulder formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky grassland toward a large rock formation

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation on hillside ahead
tall evergreen trees on left hillside
tall evergreen trees on right hillside
rocky ground with scattered stones and grass
tall green grass covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a wide-open rocky grassland at dawn, approaching a large boulder formation on the hillside. Tall pine trees line the distant hills under a clear blue-purple sky, with wild grasses and scattered rocks covering the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path with wildflowers approaching wooden fence

events.description: horse rider appears on the path ahead moving toward camera
horse rider passes by on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the grassy path, observing the surroundings and the passing rider

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the path, passing by the player

entered.detail: white flowers growing in the grass along the path
wooden fence posts marking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a grassy trail dotted with white wildflowers, passing the large rock formation. A horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by on the left, while a wooden fence becomes visible in the distance marking the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside approach with wooden bridge structure

events.description: river stream becomes visible through the trees ahead
camera turns toward the east, revealing brighter dawn light on the horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching the river, looking at the water and surrounding vegetation

entered.detail: flowing river with rocky banks visible through the trees
wooden bridge with railings crossing the river
rocky hillside with trees on the right side
purple lupine flowers growing on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a river stream flowing through the valley, with a wooden bridge structure becoming visible. The camera pans to show purple wildflowers on the riverbank and the dawn light brightening on the eastern horizon, revealing rocky cliffs and dense pine forest.

events.description: player steps onto the wooden bridge deck, ground changes from dirt to planks

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden bridge, looking at the river below and mountains ahead

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with log railings crossing the river
distant mountain peaks visible beyond the river

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wooden bridge over the river, with the ground surface changing from dirt trail to wooden planks. The river flows below on the left while distant mountains become visible ahead, framed by pine trees and the bridge's wooden railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rocky wilderness at dawn that gradually transitions from open grasslands to a forested river crossing. It begins by moving across a wide expanse of rocky terrain toward a large boulder formation under a clear blue-purple sky. As the camera follows a grassy trail dotted with white wildflowers, a horse rider passes by on the left before a distant wooden fence guides the path forward. The scene then opens up to a river stream in the valley, where the dawn light brightens on the eastern horizon to reveal purple wildflowers and towering rocky cliffs. Finally, the camera crosses a wooden bridge, shifting from a dirt trail to wooden planks as the view expands to show distant mountains framed by dense pine forests.
